step.title: Load review summary
step.action: Read the aggregated review summary from run-all-reviews.

step.title: Check all 6 gates passed
step.action: Verify that all 6 review gates (code review, QA tests, security, test automation, test quality, performance) passed.

step.title: Apply adaptive substitutions
step.action: For infrastructure stories, apply adaptive substitutions per the architecture spec — some gates may be waived or adjusted.

step.title: Report PASS/FAIL
step.action: Produce a gate decision. If all required gates pass, route to sprint-status. If any fail, route back to dev-story with feedback.
